LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EXIGEN SERVICES (USA), INC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO JUDICIALLY SUPERVISED SETTLEMENT (CCP 664.6) AND REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. A MOTION FILED PER SECTION 664.6 REQUIRES, AT A MINIMUM, A SIGNED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OR A TRANSCRIPT OF A SETTLEMENT AGREED TO ON THE RECORD. THE MOVING PAPERS CONTAIN NEITHER. ORDER SIGNED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF EXIGEN SERVICES (USA), INC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO JUDICIALLY SUPERVISED SETTLEMENT (CCP 664.6) AND REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS.
Appearances. Darrell Palmer of the Law Offices of Darrell Palmer (858.792.5600) for defendant and responding party; Thomas Marc Litton of the Law Offices of Thomas Marc Litton (421.4774) for plaintiff and moving party.
Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. A motion filed per section 664.6 requires, at a minimum, a signed settlement agreement or a transcript of a settlement agreed to on the record. The moving papers contain neither. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604
